description_long: This is a white cup with a rounded bowl shape and a single, thick handle attached to one side. A prominent red-and-white striped straw is inserted into the cup, curving outward and upward. The cup's surface appears smooth and slightly matte, with no visible branding or text. The interior is hollow, suitable for holding liquids, and the rim is gently curved. On one side, the cup features a stylized face with large black eyes and a small pink nose, giving it a playful, cartoonish appearance. The overall design is whimsical and eye-catching, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A white cup with a handle, a red-and-white striped straw, and a cartoon face on one side. The surface is smooth and matte, with playful, bold features.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from the side, showing the handle and the red-and-white striped straw emerging from the rim.
description_view_1: The handle is most prominent, and the straw curves outward; the cup's interior is clearly visible.
description_view_2: The front of the cup displays a cartoon face with large black eyes and a pink nose, along with the straw and part of the handle.
description_view_3: The back of the cup is visible, showing the straw and a plain, undecorated surface.
